_comment: AI draft — Payment batch. Payment void already uses Tirtir (clean). This batch: normalize Supplier 'Bixiye' -> 'Alaab keene' (locked term) in the 4 outliers, via exact per-key values (NOT a substring swap — 'bixiye' is also inside payment verbs like 'bixiyey'/'bixisay'). Plus a void-body consistency tweak.
partiesEmptyMessage: Macaamiil ama alaab keene weli ma jiro.
suppliersHeadlineCount: {count, plural, =0{Alaab keene deyn leh ma jiro} =1{1 alaab keene oo deyn leh} other{{count} alaab keene oo deyn leh}}
paymentVoidConfirmBody: Tani lacagta way tirtiraysaa oo dib u furaysaa wixii la bixiyay. Lama soo celin karo.
was 'way ka noqonaysaa'; match Sale/Receive void bodies
